{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/105292506?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/AnuragBathani", "id": 105292506, "login": "AnuragBathani", "node_id": "U_kgDOBkai2g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/AnuragBathani", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-61549", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-269", "name": "Improper Privilege Management"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact

A privilege escalation vulnerability affects Woodpecker instances using the **Kubernetes backend**.

The pipeline option `backend_options.kubernetes.serviceAccountName` was passed directly to the pod spec without any admin gating.

**Who is impacted:** any operator running the Kubernetes backend. Any user with **Push** permission on a connected repository can run pipeline pods under an arbitrary ServiceAccount in the pipeline namespace, gaining that account's RBAC permissions. If a privileged ServiceAccount is reachable in that namespace, this can lead to secret exfiltration (database credentials, API keys, TLS certs) and full cluster takeover.

### Patches

https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/pull/6792

### Workarounds

Operators who cannot upgrade immediately can mitigate by any of:

- **Restrict Push access** on repositories connected to the Kubernetes-backed instance to
  trusted users only.
- **Harden the pipeline namespace**: ensure no privileged ServiceAccount exists or is bound in
  the namespace where pipeline pods run; keep the `default` ServiceAccount minimally privileged.
- **Disable ServiceAccount token automounting** for ServiceAccounts that should not be used by
  pipelines.
- **Enforce an admission policy** (e.g. OPA/Gatekeeper, Kyverno, or a ValidatingAdmissionPolicy)
  that rejects pipeline pods setting an unexpected `serviceAccountName`.
- **Use a dedicated, isolated namespace** per org/instance with no sensitive RBAC bindings.

### Resources

- Vulnerable option introduced in commit `609ba481b5e912f59aaae8ca7bc22b44523c5e37`
- Affected versions: `v1.0.0` through `v3.15.0`
- Source: `pipeline/backend/kubernetes/backend_options.go` (field `ServiceAccountName`),
  `pipeline/backend/kubernetes/pod.go` (assigned to pod spec with no gating)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qf34-295c-26v8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-14T20:29:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf34-295c-26v8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qf34-295c-26v8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-61549"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-14T20:29:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/security/advisories/GHSA-qf34-295c-26v8", "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/pull/6792", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf34-295c-26v8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker/security-advisories/GHSA-qf34-295c-26v8", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker", "summary": "Woodpecker: Privilege escalation via unrestricted serviceAccountName in the Kubernetes backend", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-14T20:29:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qf34-295c-26v8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.16.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.woodpecker-ci.org/woodpecker/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.16.0"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/woodpecker-ci/woodpecker"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0.0, <= 1.0.4"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.woodpecker-ci.org/woodpecker/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.8.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Woodpecker: Privilege escalation via unrestricted serviceAccountName in the Kubernetes backend
